faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Lake Success?
faqs.answer: Lake Success properties typically deal with carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in the area's many established homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to provide the most effective treatment plan.

This includes thorough inspection, targeted treatment, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. We provide free estimates for all Lake Success residents.
